get.summary: Retrieve a list of environments (preview)
get.description: Returns a list of environments available for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of environment IDs to retrieve. When specified, only environments matching these IDs are returned.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression to restrict the set of environments returned. Supported filter properties include `dataverseId`, `type`, `geo`, `state`, `environmentGroupId`, and `domainName`.

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include in the response.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of environments to return.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of environments to skip before returning results.

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: OData order-by expression for sorting the results.

parameters.description: Filter for created on or after this date.

parameters.description: Filter for created on or before this date.

parameters.name: modifiedOnStartDate
parameters.description: Filter for modified on or after this date.

parameters.name: modifiedOnEndDate
parameters.description: Filter for modified on or before this date.

200.description: Successful request. One or more cloud flows were returned.

nextLink.description: URL to retrieve the next page of results, if any. Page size is 250.

204.description: No content. No matching cloud flows found.

404.description: Not found. Environment does not have a Microsoft Dataverse database.

localizedDescription.description: Localized description of the tenant application package
